string 2:
This isn't good... I was specifically warned to prevent this
from happening.
{next}What're you doing here?
{next}Who warned you?
{next}This isn't a place for Digimon.
You see, my partner... Huh?! Wait. What're YOU doing here?

Naturally, it was King Dra— Oops, that was a close one. I
probably shouldn't say anything.

I could say the same thing to you. This is no place for
humans, either.

Well, you ARE accompanied by Digimon... so I guess I can
share some info with you.

I was trying to investigate this place, but I lost my
partner in here somewhere...

I don't wanna search on my own. We're both here to
investigate, so let's work together!
{next}Sure. No problem.
{end}Let me think about it.
Thanks! I've gotta find my partner, and fast!

Okay, I understand. But I'm really worried about my
partner...

Please! I think my partner is somewhere inside this space.
You've gotta come with me!
Who're you guys?! You friends with these jerks?!

This is all a big misunderstanding, Gabumon! It's me! We're
here to save you!

Save me? You're the one who got us separated! ...But we're
together now, so let's go!
We're in trouble, here! I think it's time for you-know-what!
Okay, let's do it!
Yaaaaaaah!
It is time to settle this!

Thank you for your assistance. Hmm. I think I understand
this space now...
I have finished my investigation. Shall we go now?

Hey, there you are! Why did you go on ahead without me?
...Wait. Aren't you recording?
I was headed in here, too, but I got caught...

I came to check on some rather unusual info I heard... But,
this... THIS I can't overlook.
Are you gonna catch us and dissect us for your research...?
Of course not. Not if you do as you're told...

You mean it's an option you're considering?! Wait... Who are
these two, anyway?
{next}My acquaintances.
{next}I don't know them.
{next}My partners.
Yeah, I guess... although we actually just met...

Yeah, maybe it would've been better if we'd never met in the
first place.

Thanks for the vote of confidence, but we already have
partners. Sorry.

We're gonna get in trouble with our boss, so we better go.
Here. This is for you.
Maybe we'll meet again sometime.

I didn't even have time to try and capture them... What were
those things?

They said something about a boss, so maybe they're some kind
of employees, just like us.

Like, in some kind of organization, you mean...? Anyway, I've noticed
that you people keep turning up whenever there's trouble...
{next}It only seems that way.
{next}I'd like to know why as well.
{next}Are you gonna start watching us?

Way too many times now to be a coincidence. We're going to
start watching you closely.

Even if it's unintentional, anyone attracting this much
trouble should be watched closely.

That's a given. You should probably be more aware of how
you're seen by others.

Although, those two were pretty chill. They seemed friendly
and approachable to me.

It felt like they were open to discussion, even. I was
hoping to talk to them more...

Well, imagine that! I didn't think I'd ever agree with a
public safety officer.

Underneath these uniforms, we're just regular people, after
all. Shall we chat some more?
Hey, you're officially on duty, you know.

I was just joking. Anyway, I'll look around for anything
left behind.

I doubt there's anything to be found, but we might as well
continue the investigation.

And I'll continue with my own investigation. I'll let you
know if I find anything!
